TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Sahosyo rikec to Taywan == "2020 miheca Sahosyo rikec to Taywan" (Inkiris: Taiwan Assurance Act of 2020), o cecay sarekec no Amilika. Saki "2021 miheca patatekoan pafeli to payso a telek" i saka FF to saka ‚ÖĘ cecfang no B siikedan no pangangan. Likisi 'Alodo no pitelek "2019 miheca Sahosyo rikec to Taywan" i 2019 miheca 3 folad 26 romi'ad ato 4 folad 1 romi'ad masilsil i Fafa'eday pikaykian ato Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika nai ci Tom Cotton ato ci Mike McCall ko pasadakay. Ikor a mirina'an nai 2019 miheca 5 folad 7 romi'ad maemin mihayda ko Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika . I 2020 miheca 12 folad 21 romi'ad, o lawot no rikec mapacomod i "2021 miheca patatekoan pafeli to payso a telek" i saka FF to saka ‚ÖĘ cecfang no B siikedan no pangangan, toya romi'ad mihayda ko kafa'eday pikaykian ato Kararemay pikaykian, onini a roma sowal "2020 miheca Sahosyo rikec to Taywan" sanay . I 12 folad 27 romi'ad, nai ci Donald Trumpan mipangangan a malaheci . Pisalof to rikec I 2023 miheca 3 folad 22 romi'ad o kafa'eday pikaykian ira ko 404 paya ko micokeray, 7 ko miliyangay, mahayda konini a rikec to "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" (Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act), masahacecay to liyad misalof, milongoc to citodongay to rikec ato patomadaway to Kakiharan rikec no Taywan paromi'ad mitomadaw kasa 2 miheca mifalic to paratoh, palekapoten i "Pato'ek ato halaka, palasawad to mitolasay to saki Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a tilidan . 2025 miheca 5 folad 5 romi'ad mihayda i ngoyosan ko kafa'eday pikaykian no Amilika, mihayda tonini nisalofan a rikec to "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" (Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act H.R. 1512), o nihaydaan i 2020 miheca a "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak 2020" (Taiwan Assurance Act of 2020) a pa'icelan a tilid . "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" milongoc to citodongay to rikec kitakit no Amilika paromi'ad mikinsa to pakayniay to kakiharan to Taywan a kacacawma' a saleko, halo maanan kadadoedo todong no tilid. Salongan kasa 5 miheca kinacecay mitomadaw, i salaloma'an no 90 romi'ad patayraen i laocan pikaykian no kitakit pasadak to piratoh . Kasaliyad tilid Salaloma'an no sarikec sapicoker to kalali'aca to sakalalood no sofitay o kararidan padama to sakacowat no Taywan a sa'icel a satena', micoker to Taywan citodong sapikihatiya to sakapot no kasakitakit, milongoc to citodongay to rikec no kitakit patodong mitomadaw sakihar to Taywan "Saki Taywan kacacawma' a saleko" a tilid to sapitomadaw a masafa'eloh ko saleko, saki "Pirarakat rikec to Taywan" sapidemak ato sakaciroma no sademak pasadak a ratoh. "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak". "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak 2020" salofan: milongoc to citodongay to rikec no Amilika to "sakayat kakiharan to Taywan" sapiparomi'ad mitomadaw ato misafa'eloh to ratoh. Nai Kararemay pikaykian ato Fafa'eday pikaykian kalacecayan mitelek Amilika kitakit: Saka 1 liyad, Mamoko'ay sowal. Onini a rikec O "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" (Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act). Saka 2 liyad, Patongal no citodongay to rikec i sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan a todong ratoh. "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak 2020" saka 315 liyad (kapolongan rikec saka 116 ‚Äď 260 haw saka FF felih saka III cefang B siikedan no pangangan; 134Stat. 3100) falican i laeno: (1) I saka hecek saka (1) paring, nai "memorandum" a sowal pacomod: "paikor to tilid, ano eca maanan to halo sakayat kakiharan to Taywan a todong no tilid". (2) Satelocan no tilid parafas to fa'elohay saka hecek: Paromi'ad mitomadaw ato safa'eloh parotoh. (1) Saan a setekan. Nai citodongay no kitakit padoedo to maanan sakowan ato sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan (tinako saka hecek a paini) a saanan, o citodongay no kitakit o: Salongan 5 miheca, pasi citodongay no kitakit to sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan ko mitomadaway, halo ngangan "to sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan" (Guidelines on Relations with Taiwan) romi'adan patilidan ato satodongan no tilid, miliyaw miratoh to sakayat no midemakay a citodongay; ato Kalahecian i saka (1) a paring setek a mitomadaw i 'ayaw no 90 romi'ad i, pasi Fafa'eday pikaykian kacacofelan a demak iingkay ato Kararemay pikaykian kacacofelan a cidemakay iingkay a pasadak to fa'elohay ratoh. (2) Laloma'an no ratoh. Midotoc saka (1) a paring ko pilongoc misafa'eloh paratoh halo: saka hecek nilongocan a polong no saratoh; ato saheci to pisafa'eloh a sacayat samaanen milaheci saka hecek nisowalan to pato'ekan a patosokan. Picaliwan minengneng 9."2022ŚĻīÁ∂úŚźąśí•ś¨ĺś≥ē" Enemay sahosyo
S.PHON: == sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan == "**** mińß…ô ¶a sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" (inkiris: taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô a ¶t o~uf ****), o~u ¶…ô ¶aj sar…ôk…ô ¶ no~u ami…ĺika. saki "**** mińß…ô ¶a patat…ôko~uan paf…ô…ĺi to~u pajso~u a t…ô…ĺ…ôk" i saka ff to~u saka * ¶…ô ¶faŇč no~u b~b~v siik…ô…¨~…ģan no~u paŇčaŇčan. …ĺikisi °a…ĺo~u…¨~…ģo~u no~u pit…ô…ĺ…ôk "**** mińß…ô ¶a sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ato~u * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ masi…ĺsi…ĺ i fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ato~u karar…ômaj pikajkian no~u ami…ĺika nai ¶i to~um ¶o~utto~un ato~u ¶i mik…ô m ¶ ¶a…ĺ…ĺ ko~u pasa…¨~…ģakaj. iko~ur a mirina °an nai **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ma…ômin mińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u karar…ômaj pikajkian no~u ami…ĺika . i **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u …ĺawo~ut no~u rik…ô ¶ mapa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i "**** mińß…ô ¶a patat…ôko~uan paf…ô…ĺi to~u pajso~u a t…ô…ĺ…ôk" i saka ff to~u saka * ¶…ô ¶faŇč no~u b~b~v siik…ô…¨~…ģan no~u paŇčaŇčan, to~uja ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ato~u karar…ômaj pikajkian, o~unini a ro~uma so~uwa…ĺ "**** mińß…ô ¶a sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" sanaj . i ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, nai ¶i …¨~…ģo~una…ĺ…¨~…ģ tro~u~umpan mipaŇčaŇčan a ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i . pisa…ĺo~uf to~u rik…ô ¶ i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ o~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ira ko~u *** paja ko~u mi ¶o~uk…ôraj, * ko~u mi…ĺijaŇčaj, mańßaj…¨~…ģa ko~unini a rik…ô ¶ to~u "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô imp…ĺ…ôm…ôntatio~un a ¶t), masańßa ¶…ô ¶aj to~u …ĺija…¨~…ģ misa…ĺo~uf, mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ ato~u pato~uma…¨~…ģawaj to~u kakińßaran rik…ô ¶ no~u tajwan paro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mito~uma…¨~…ģaw kasa * mińß…ô ¶a mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u parato~uńß, pa…ĺ…ôkapo~ut…ôn i "pato~u °…ôk ato~u ńßa…ĺaka, pa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u mito~u…ĺasaj to~u saki kakińßaran rik…ô ¶ no~u tajwan" a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan . **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mińßaj…¨~…ģa i Ňčo~ujo~usan ko~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian no~u ami…ĺika, mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~unini nisa…ĺo~ufan a rik…ô ¶ to~u "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô imp…ĺ…ôm…ôntatio~un a ¶t ńß.r. ****), o~u nińßaj…¨~…ģaan i **** mińß…ô ¶a a "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak ****" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô a ¶t o~uf ****) a pa °i ¶…ô…ĺan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ . "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ kitakit no~u ami…ĺika paro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mikinsa to~u pakajniaj to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan a ka ¶a ¶awma ° a sa…ĺ…ôko~u, ńßa…ĺo~u maanan ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. sa…ĺo~uŇčan kasa * mińß…ô ¶a kina ¶…ô ¶aj mito~uma…¨~…ģaw, i sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ patajra…ôn i …ĺao~u ¶an pikajkian no~u kitakit pasa…¨~…ģak to~u pirato~uńß . kasa…ĺija…¨~…ģ ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u sarik…ô ¶ sapi ¶o~uk…ôr to~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a to~u saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u so~ufitaj o~u karari…¨~…ģan pa…¨~…ģama to~u saka ¶o~uwat no~u tajwan a sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ a sat…ôna °, mi ¶o~uk…ôr to~u tajwan ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč sapikińßatija to~u sakapo~ut no~u kasakitakit, mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ no~u kitakit pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč mito~uma…¨~…ģaw sakińßar to~u tajwan "saki tajwan ka ¶a ¶awma ° a sa…ĺ…ôko~u" a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u sapito~uma…¨~…ģaw a masafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß ko~u sa…ĺ…ôko~u, saki "pirarakat rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" sapi…¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u saka ¶iro~uma no~u sa…¨~…ģ…ômak pasa…¨~…ģak a rato~uńß. "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak". "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak ****" sa…ĺo~ufan: mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ no~u ami…ĺika to~u "sakajat kakińßaran to~u tajwan" sapiparo~umi °a…¨~…ģ mito~uma…¨~…ģaw ato~u misafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß to~u rato~uńß. nai karar…ômaj pikajkian ato~u fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ka…ĺa ¶…ô ¶ajan mit…ô…ĺ…ôk ami…ĺika kitakit: saka * …ĺija…¨~…ģ, mamo~uko~u °aj so~uwa…ĺ. o~unini a rik…ô ¶ o~u "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô imp…ĺ…ôm…ôntatio~un a ¶t). saka * …ĺija…¨~…ģ, pato~uŇča…ĺ no~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ i sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč rato~uńß. "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak ****" saka *** …ĺija…¨~…ģ (kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan rik…ô ¶ saka *** * *** ńßaw saka ff f…ô…ĺińß saka iii ¶…ôfaŇč b~b~v siik…ô…¨~…ģan no~u paŇčaŇčan; ***stat. ****) fa…ĺi ¶an i …ĺa…ôno~u: (*) i saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk saka (*) pariŇč, nai "m…ômo~uran…¨~…ģo~u~um" a so~uwa…ĺ pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ: "paiko~ur to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ano~u …ô ¶a maanan to~u ńßa…ĺo~u sakajat kakińßaran to~u tajwan a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ". (*) sat…ô…ĺo~u ¶an no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ parafas to~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk: paro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mito~uma…¨~…ģaw ato~u safa °…ô…ĺo~uńß paro~uto~uńß. (*) saan a s…ôt…ôkan. nai ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u kitakit pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u maanan sako~uwan ato~u sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan (tinako~u saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk a paini) a saanan, o~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u kitakit o~u: sa…ĺo~uŇčan * mińß…ô ¶a, pasi ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u kitakit to~u sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan ko~u mito~uma…¨~…ģawaj, ńßa…ĺo~u ŇčaŇčan "to~u sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan" (*o~u~ui…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺin…ôs o~un r…ô…ĺatio~uns witńß taiwan) ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan pati…ĺi…¨~…ģan ato~u sato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčan no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mi…ĺijaw mirato~uńß to~u sakajat no~u mi…¨~…ģ…ômakaj a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj; ato~u ka…ĺańß…ô ¶ian i saka (*) a pariŇč s…ôt…ôk a mito~uma…¨~…ģaw i °ajaw no~u ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, pasi fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ka ¶a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺan a …¨~…ģ…ômak iiŇčkaj ato~u karar…ômaj pikajkian ka ¶a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺan a ¶i…¨~…ģ…ômakaj iiŇčkaj a pasa…¨~…ģak to~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj rato~uńß. (*) …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u rato~uńß. mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ saka (*) a pariŇč ko~u pi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ misafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß parato~uńß ńßa…ĺo~u: saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk ni…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶an a po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u sarato~uńß; ato~u sańß…ô ¶i to~u pisafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß a sa ¶ajat samaan…ôn mi…ĺańß…ô ¶i saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk niso~uwa…ĺan to~u pato~u °…ôkan a pato~uso~ukan. pi ¶a…ĺiwan min…ôŇčn…ôŇč *."**********" …ôn…ômaj sańßo~usjo~u
S.FORM: == Sahosyo rikec to Taywan == "2020 miheca Sahosyo rikec to Taywan" (Inkiris: Taiwan Assurance Act of 2020), o cecay sarekec no Amilika. Saki "2021 miheca patatekoan pafeli to payso a telek" i saka FF to saka ‚ÖĘ cecfang no B siikedan no pangangan. Likisi 'Alodo no pitelek "2019 miheca Sahosyo rikec to Taywan" i 2019 miheca 3 folad 26 romi'ad ato 4 folad 1 romi'ad masilsil i Fafa'eday pikaykian ato Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika nai ci Tom Cotton ato ci Mike McCall ko pasadakay. Ikor a mirina'an nai 2019 miheca 5 folad 7 romi'ad maemin mihayda ko Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika . I 2020 miheca 12 folad 21 romi'ad, o lawot no rikec mapacomod i "2021 miheca patatekoan pafeli to payso a telek" i saka FF to saka ‚ÖĘ cecfang no B siikedan no pangangan, toya romi'ad mihayda ko kafa'eday pikaykian ato Kararemay pikaykian, onini a roma sowal "2020 miheca Sahosyo rikec to Taywan" sanay . I 12 folad 27 romi'ad, nai ci Donald Trumpan mipangangan a malaheci . Pisalof to rikec I 2023 miheca 3 folad 22 romi'ad o kafa'eday pikaykian ira ko 404 paya ko micokeray, 7 ko miliyangay, mahayda konini a rikec to "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" (Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act), masahacecay to liyad misalof, milongoc to citodongay to rikec ato patomadaway to Kakiharan rikec no Taywan paromi'ad mitomadaw kasa 2 miheca mifalic to paratoh, palekapoten i "Pato'ek ato halaka, palasawad to mitolasay to saki Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a tilidan . 2025 miheca 5 folad 5 romi'ad mihayda i ngoyosan ko kafa'eday pikaykian no Amilika, mihayda tonini nisalofan a rikec to "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" (Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act H.R. 1512), o nihaydaan i 2020 miheca a "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak 2020" (Taiwan Assurance Act of 2020) a pa'icelan a tilid . "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" milongoc to citodongay to rikec kitakit no Amilika paromi'ad mikinsa to pakayniay to kakiharan to Taywan a kacacawma' a saleko, halo maanan kadadoedo todong no tilid. Salongan kasa 5 miheca kinacecay mitomadaw, i salaloma'an no 90 romi'ad patayraen i laocan pikaykian no kitakit pasadak to piratoh . Kasaliyad tilid Salaloma'an no sarikec sapicoker to kalali'aca to sakalalood no sofitay o kararidan padama to sakacowat no Taywan a sa'icel a satena', micoker to Taywan citodong sapikihatiya to sakapot no kasakitakit, milongoc to citodongay to rikec no kitakit patodong mitomadaw sakihar to Taywan "Saki Taywan kacacawma' a saleko" a tilid to sapitomadaw a masafa'eloh ko saleko, saki "Pirarakat rikec to Taywan" sapidemak ato sakaciroma no sademak pasadak a ratoh. "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak". "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak 2020" salofan: milongoc to citodongay to rikec no Amilika to "sakayat kakiharan to Taywan" sapiparomi'ad mitomadaw ato misafa'eloh to ratoh. Nai Kararemay pikaykian ato Fafa'eday pikaykian kalacecayan mitelek Amilika kitakit: Saka 1 liyad, Mamoko'ay sowal. Onini a rikec O "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak" (Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act). Saka 2 liyad, Patongal no citodongay to rikec i sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan a todong ratoh. "Sahosyo rikec to Taywan sademak 2020" saka 315 liyad (kapolongan rikec saka 116 ‚Äď 260 haw saka FF felih saka III cefang B siikedan no pangangan; 134Stat. 3100) falican i laeno: (1) I saka hecek saka (1) paring, nai "memorandum" a sowal pacomod: "paikor to tilid, ano eca maanan to halo sakayat kakiharan to Taywan a todong no tilid". (2) Satelocan no tilid parafas to fa'elohay saka hecek: Paromi'ad mitomadaw ato safa'eloh parotoh. (1) Saan a setekan. Nai citodongay no kitakit padoedo to maanan sakowan ato sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan (tinako saka hecek a paini) a saanan, o citodongay no kitakit o: Salongan 5 miheca, pasi citodongay no kitakit to sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan ko mitomadaway, halo ngangan "to sakayat to kakiharan to Taywan" (Guidelines on Relations with Taiwan) romi'adan patilidan ato satodongan no tilid, miliyaw miratoh to sakayat no midemakay a citodongay; ato Kalahecian i saka (1) a paring setek a mitomadaw i 'ayaw no 90 romi'ad i, pasi Fafa'eday pikaykian kacacofelan a demak iingkay ato Kararemay pikaykian kacacofelan a cidemakay iingkay a pasadak to fa'elohay ratoh. (2) Laloma'an no ratoh. Midotoc saka (1) a paring ko pilongoc misafa'eloh paratoh halo: saka hecek nilongocan a polong no saratoh; ato saheci to pisafa'eloh a sacayat samaanen milaheci saka hecek nisowalan to pato'ekan a patosokan. Picaliwan minengneng 9."2022ŚĻīÁ∂úŚźąśí•ś¨ĺś≥ē" Enemay sahosyo
S.PHON: == sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan == "**** mińß…ô ¶a sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" (inkiris: taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô a ¶t o~uf ****), o~u ¶…ô ¶aj sar…ôk…ô ¶ no~u ami…ĺika. saki "**** mińß…ô ¶a patat…ôko~uan paf…ô…ĺi to~u pajso~u a t…ô…ĺ…ôk" i saka ff to~u saka * ¶…ô ¶faŇč no~u b~b~v siik…ô…¨~…ģan no~u paŇčaŇčan. …ĺikisi °a…ĺo~u…¨~…ģo~u no~u pit…ô…ĺ…ôk "**** mińß…ô ¶a sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ato~u * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ masi…ĺsi…ĺ i fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ato~u karar…ômaj pikajkian no~u ami…ĺika nai ¶i to~um ¶o~utto~un ato~u ¶i mik…ô m ¶ ¶a…ĺ…ĺ ko~u pasa…¨~…ģakaj. iko~ur a mirina °an nai **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ma…ômin mińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u karar…ômaj pikajkian no~u ami…ĺika . i **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u …ĺawo~ut no~u rik…ô ¶ mapa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i "**** mińß…ô ¶a patat…ôko~uan paf…ô…ĺi to~u pajso~u a t…ô…ĺ…ôk" i saka ff to~u saka * ¶…ô ¶faŇč no~u b~b~v siik…ô…¨~…ģan no~u paŇčaŇčan, to~uja ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ato~u karar…ômaj pikajkian, o~unini a ro~uma so~uwa…ĺ "**** mińß…ô ¶a sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" sanaj . i ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, nai ¶i …¨~…ģo~una…ĺ…¨~…ģ tro~u~umpan mipaŇčaŇčan a ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i . pisa…ĺo~uf to~u rik…ô ¶ i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ o~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ira ko~u *** paja ko~u mi ¶o~uk…ôraj, * ko~u mi…ĺijaŇčaj, mańßaj…¨~…ģa ko~unini a rik…ô ¶ to~u "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô imp…ĺ…ôm…ôntatio~un a ¶t), masańßa ¶…ô ¶aj to~u …ĺija…¨~…ģ misa…ĺo~uf, mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ ato~u pato~uma…¨~…ģawaj to~u kakińßaran rik…ô ¶ no~u tajwan paro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mito~uma…¨~…ģaw kasa * mińß…ô ¶a mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u parato~uńß, pa…ĺ…ôkapo~ut…ôn i "pato~u °…ôk ato~u ńßa…ĺaka, pa…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u mito~u…ĺasaj to~u saki kakińßaran rik…ô ¶ no~u tajwan" a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan . **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mińßaj…¨~…ģa i Ňčo~ujo~usan ko~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian no~u ami…ĺika, mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~unini nisa…ĺo~ufan a rik…ô ¶ to~u "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô imp…ĺ…ôm…ôntatio~un a ¶t ńß.r. ****), o~u nińßaj…¨~…ģaan i **** mińß…ô ¶a a "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak ****" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô a ¶t o~uf ****) a pa °i ¶…ô…ĺan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ . "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ kitakit no~u ami…ĺika paro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mikinsa to~u pakajniaj to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan a ka ¶a ¶awma ° a sa…ĺ…ôko~u, ńßa…ĺo~u maanan ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. sa…ĺo~uŇčan kasa * mińß…ô ¶a kina ¶…ô ¶aj mito~uma…¨~…ģaw, i sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ patajra…ôn i …ĺao~u ¶an pikajkian no~u kitakit pasa…¨~…ģak to~u pirato~uńß . kasa…ĺija…¨~…ģ ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ sa…ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u sarik…ô ¶ sapi ¶o~uk…ôr to~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶a to~u saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u so~ufitaj o~u karari…¨~…ģan pa…¨~…ģama to~u saka ¶o~uwat no~u tajwan a sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ a sat…ôna °, mi ¶o~uk…ôr to~u tajwan ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč sapikińßatija to~u sakapo~ut no~u kasakitakit, mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ no~u kitakit pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč mito~uma…¨~…ģaw sakińßar to~u tajwan "saki tajwan ka ¶a ¶awma ° a sa…ĺ…ôko~u" a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u sapito~uma…¨~…ģaw a masafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß ko~u sa…ĺ…ôko~u, saki "pirarakat rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan" sapi…¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u saka ¶iro~uma no~u sa…¨~…ģ…ômak pasa…¨~…ģak a rato~uńß. "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak". "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak ****" sa…ĺo~ufan: mi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ no~u ami…ĺika to~u "sakajat kakińßaran to~u tajwan" sapiparo~umi °a…¨~…ģ mito~uma…¨~…ģaw ato~u misafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß to~u rato~uńß. nai karar…ômaj pikajkian ato~u fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ka…ĺa ¶…ô ¶ajan mit…ô…ĺ…ôk ami…ĺika kitakit: saka * …ĺija…¨~…ģ, mamo~uko~u °aj so~uwa…ĺ. o~unini a rik…ô ¶ o~u "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak" (taiwan asso~u~uran ¶…ô imp…ĺ…ôm…ôntatio~un a ¶t). saka * …ĺija…¨~…ģ, pato~uŇča…ĺ no~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u rik…ô ¶ i sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč rato~uńß. "sańßo~usjo~u rik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan sa…¨~…ģ…ômak ****" saka *** …ĺija…¨~…ģ (kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan rik…ô ¶ saka *** * *** ńßaw saka ff f…ô…ĺińß saka iii ¶…ôfaŇč b~b~v siik…ô…¨~…ģan no~u paŇčaŇčan; ***stat. ****) fa…ĺi ¶an i …ĺa…ôno~u: (*) i saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk saka (*) pariŇč, nai "m…ômo~uran…¨~…ģo~u~um" a so~uwa…ĺ pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ: "paiko~ur to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ano~u …ô ¶a maanan to~u ńßa…ĺo~u sakajat kakińßaran to~u tajwan a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ". (*) sat…ô…ĺo~u ¶an no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ parafas to~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk: paro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mito~uma…¨~…ģaw ato~u safa °…ô…ĺo~uńß paro~uto~uńß. (*) saan a s…ôt…ôkan. nai ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u kitakit pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u maanan sako~uwan ato~u sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan (tinako~u saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk a paini) a saanan, o~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u kitakit o~u: sa…ĺo~uŇčan * mińß…ô ¶a, pasi ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u kitakit to~u sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan ko~u mito~uma…¨~…ģawaj, ńßa…ĺo~u ŇčaŇčan "to~u sakajat to~u kakińßaran to~u tajwan" (*o~u~ui…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺin…ôs o~un r…ô…ĺatio~uns witńß taiwan) ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan pati…ĺi…¨~…ģan ato~u sato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčan no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mi…ĺijaw mirato~uńß to~u sakajat no~u mi…¨~…ģ…ômakaj a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj; ato~u ka…ĺańß…ô ¶ian i saka (*) a pariŇč s…ôt…ôk a mito~uma…¨~…ģaw i °ajaw no~u ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i, pasi fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj pikajkian ka ¶a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺan a …¨~…ģ…ômak iiŇčkaj ato~u karar…ômaj pikajkian ka ¶a ¶o~uf…ô…ĺan a ¶i…¨~…ģ…ômakaj iiŇčkaj a pasa…¨~…ģak to~u fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj rato~uńß. (*) …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u rato~uńß. mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ saka (*) a pariŇč ko~u pi…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ misafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß parato~uńß ńßa…ĺo~u: saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk ni…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶an a po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u sarato~uńß; ato~u sańß…ô ¶i to~u pisafa °…ô…ĺo~uńß a sa ¶ajat samaan…ôn mi…ĺańß…ô ¶i saka ńß…ô ¶…ôk niso~uwa…ĺan to~u pato~u °…ôkan a pato~uso~ukan. pi ¶a…ĺiwan min…ôŇčn…ôŇč *."**********" …ôn…ômaj sańßo~usjo~u
